_comment: Accepted-findings baseline for the ClawHub scan gate (scripts/clawhub-scan-gate.mjs). The gate fails only when a published version's scan contains a finding NOT listed here (a regression) — it does not require the scan to be 'clean', because the current 'suspicious' verdict comes from accepted items (see notes). Regenerate after a release with: node scripts/clawhub-scan-gate.mjs --version <v> --update
generatedFrom: openclaw-hawkins@2.0.0 scan, minus the findings fixed in 2.0.1

notes.static/exposed_secret_literal/src/config: FALSE POSITIVE — reads MARIADB_PASSWORD from the environment; no hardcoded secret. Not obfuscated away by design.
notes.static/exposed_secret_literal/src/hive/c: FALSE POSITIVE — resolves VECNA_AUTH_TOKEN from the environment; no hardcoded secret.
notes.skillspector/SDI-*: Scope judgments: the package is an installer that provisions a 6-agent orchestration runtime (VINES/VECNA/Linear CLIs). Disclosed and purpose-aligned; not scope creep.
notes.skillspector/SQP-1: Skill descriptions are broad by design for routing; acceptable.
notes.skillspector/RA2/INSTALL.md: Persistent systemd service + agent install are intentional, disclosed setup behavior.
notes.removed-in-2.0.1: skillspector SQP-2 on src/plugin/setup.ts, src/plugin/tools.ts, and skills/vision-agent-skill/SKILL.md, plus the clawscan 'unexpected' setup.ts finding, were addressed — they are intentionally absent so a reappearance is flagged.
